questions.question: In what year did World War II end?
questions.explanation: WWII ended with Japan's surrender on September 2, 1945.

questions.question: Who was the first President of the United States?
questions.explanation: Washington served as president from 1789 to 1797.

questions.question: What ancient civilization built the pyramids of Giza?
questions.explanation: The Great Pyramid was built around 2560 BCE for Pharaoh Khufu.

questions.question: What year did the Berlin Wall fall?
questions.explanation: The Berlin Wall fell on November 9, 1989, leading to German reunification.

questions.question: Who was the first woman to fly solo across the Atlantic?
questions.explanation: Earhart made the solo flight in 1932, five years after Lindbergh.

questions.question: The Magna Carta was signed in which year?
questions.explanation: King John of England sealed the Magna Carta at Runnymede on June 15, 1215.

questions.question: What was the Treaty of Westphalia (1648) primarily about?
questions.explanation: The treaty established the concept of state sovereignty in international relations.

questions.question: Who was the last pharaoh of ancient Egypt?
questions.explanation: Cleopatra VII ruled from 51 BCE until her death in 30 BCE.

questions.question: What empire was ruled by Suleiman the Magnificent?
questions.explanation: Suleiman I ruled the Ottoman Empire from 1520 to 1566 during its golden age.

questions.question: What ship sank on its maiden voyage in 1912?
questions.explanation: The Titanic sank after hitting an iceberg on April 15, 1912.
